## ERT1.3. Rate of using available airspace structures (PI#11) {#ert1.3.-rate-of-using-available-airspace-structures-pi11 .Heading-2-ER}

BELGIUM and LUXEMBOURG report that:

- The ratio of the use of the available airspace structures is **17%** (via available restricted and segregated airspaces)

- The ratio of the use of the available airspace structures is **86%** (via available conditional routes -- CDR)

BRUSSELS ACC

- The ratio of the use of the available airspace structures is **34%** (via available restricted and segregated airspaces)

- The ratio of the use of the available airspace structures is **126%** (via available conditional routes -- CDR)

*[IMPORTANT NOTE:]{.underline}*

*The ratios reported by BELGIUM are not aligned with existing NM data. It will be useful to know the source of this data reported by BELGIUM.*
